name: Purifying Flame

abilities.name: Demise (Flashover)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, models within (r)1" gain a Burning token.

abilities.name: Flameborn
abilities.text: When this model would suffer damage from a Burning token, it instead heals that amount.

abilities.name: Node
abilities.text: Friendly models within 8" may draw range and LoS for (magic) actions from this model.

abilities.name: Set Ablaze
abilities.text: When an enemy model within 8" resolves a Burning token, it damages enemy models within (r)4" instead of base contact.

triggers.name: Controlled Burn
triggers.text: Choose an Inferno marker within 2" of the target. Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)2" of the chosen marker.

actions.name: Flame Blast
actions.effects: The target and models within (aura)2" of the target gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Big Boom
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the (aura) of this action by 1".

actions.name: Hovering Flame
actions.effects: Move this model up to 5", ignoring other models. Models moved through this way gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Drag Along
triggers.text: Choose a marker within 2". Make a copy of the chosen marker into base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Flaming Shield
triggers.text: Friendly models moved through this way gain a Shielded token instead of a Burning token.

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.effects: Draw two cards and then discard one card.

extraction_notes: STN: 10 appears below the artwork - likely a reference number or strength value not part of standard stat card structure
